svg.title: AgentOS System Architecture
svg.desc: Seven-layer architecture from top to bottom: API Surface (generateText, streamText, generateObject, generateImage, agent, agency, mission), Cognitive Substrate (GMI coordinator, PersonaOverlayManager, SentimentTracker, MetapromptExecutor), Memory and RAG (4-tier memory: working/episodic/semantic/observational, 8 cognitive mechanisms, retrieval via Ebbinghaus/reconsolidation/RIF/FOK/HyDE/GraphRAG/rerank, vector backends SQLite/HNSW/Postgres/Qdrant/Pinecone/Neo4j/Supabase), Tools and Capabilities (ToolOrchestrator, ExtensionRegistry, SkillRegistry, CapabilityDiscovery, ForgeToolMetaTool), Guardrails and HITL (GuardrailDispatcher, PII redaction, ML classifiers, Grounding Guard, HumanInteract), Orchestration (workflow, mission, AgentGraph, CompiledExecutionGraph, CheckpointStore), and I/O and Providers (voice pipeline, channels, media generation, 21 LLM providers, OpenRouter fanout).
svg.text: Seven cooperating layers · caller-facing API at the top · channels and providers at the floor · cognition + memory + safety in the middle

g.text: High-level helpers — pure functions for one-shot
Per-agent coordinator that owns persona, mood,
working state, and the per-turn reasoning trace
ONNX classifiers · NLI grounding · 5 approval triggers
3 authoring APIs compile to one IR · graph
runtime executes every plan · checkpoint + resume
Voice pipeline · channel adapters · media generation
